command:
uv run python -u -c 
import time
from tasks.t0008_port_modeldb_189347.code.build_cell import build_dsgc, read_synapse_coords, run_one_trial
h = build_dsgc()
baseline = read_synapse_coords(h=h)
for angle in [0.0, 90.0, 180.0, 270.0]:
    t1 = time.time()
    r = run_one_trial(h=h, angle_deg=angle, seed=1, baseline_coords=baseline)
    print(f'angle={angle:6.1f}  rate={r:.2f} Hz  ({time.time()-t1:.1f}s)', flush=True)
